info.description: This is a sample server for homelab.
info.title: Homelab API

get.description: Retrieves historical execution logs with cursor-based pagination.

post.description: Removes task instances and logs older than the specified number of days.

parameters.description: Days older than which instances will be deleted
parameters.name: days

get.description: Retrieves a specific task instance by its ID.

delete.description: Removes a specific task instance and its execution logs.

post.description: Attempts to terminate a running task instance gracefully by sending a cancellation signal.

get.description: Returns execution logs for a specific task instance or step, supporting line offset for real-time refresh.

parameters.description: Step Index (0 for engine, 1+ for steps)
parameters.name: stepIndex

parameters.description: Line offset to start reading from
parameters.name: offset

get.description: Returns the specifications (inputs/outputs) for all registered task processors in the system.

post.description: Executes a specific processor in isolation within a temporary workspace. Useful for debugging or testing parameters.
Checks if a regex string is syntactically correct for Go.

get.description: Asynchronously triggers a workflow using its unique security token. No standard authentication required.

post.description: Asynchronously triggers a workflow using its unique security token. No standard authentication required.

get.description: Retrieves a list of defined workflow templates with cursor-based pagination.

post.description: Creates a new workflow template with the provided steps and configuration.

get.description: Returns the JSON schema for workflow templates, dynamically generated based on available processors.

post.description: Checks if a workflow configuration is valid, including variable references and 'if' expressions.

get.description: Retrieves a specific workflow template by its ID.

put.description: Updates an existing workflow template. Performs validation on the new configuration.

delete.description: Deletes a workflow template and all its associated task instances and triggers.

post.description: Regenerates the unique token used for Webhook triggering. The old token will be immediately invalidated.
Triggers the immediate execution of a workflow template. Returns the generated instance ID.

parameters.description: Logs older than these days will be deleted
parameters.name: days

get.description: Returns pong if the server is alive
Search for items in a specific discovery code (e.g. network/dns/domains)
Returns all enabled DNS domains and records in a structured format.

post.description: Evaluates the export rule and returns matched entries (no pagination).
If oldTag is empty, adds newTag. If both provided, renames oldTag to newTag.
post.summary: Add or update a tag for a CIDR in IP pool

delete.summary: Delete an entry or a specific tag from IP pool

parameters.description: Specific tag to delete (if omitted, deletes entire CIDR if no internal tags present)
parameters.name: tag

post.description: Evaluates the export rule and returns matched entries (no pagination).

post.summary: Add or update an entry in site pool

delete.summary: Delete an entry from site pool

post.summary: Trigger a site sync policy execution
Simulate permissions for a service account

get.summary: Suggest RBAC verbs for a resource
